name: Gate.io Cryptocurrency Exchange API
what_it_does: Comprehensive cryptocurrency exchange REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders and algorithmic trading systems to access spot, margin, futures (USDT/coin-margined), options, and lending markets across 1,700+ trading pairs, with HMAC-SHA512 authentication, real-time WebSocket streaming, and SDK support for multiple programming languages.
use_cases: Executing algorithmic trades via Gate.io REST API across spot, margin, and futures markets
Streaming real-time order book data via Gate.io WebSocket for trading bots and analytics
Managing futures positions via Gate.io Delivery/Perpetual API for derivatives strategies
Lending idle assets via Gate.io Margin API for yield generation automation
Accessing wide altcoin selection via Gate.io API for new token trading strategies
not_for: US users (Gate.io blocks US IP addresses — use Coinbase or Kraken for US compliance)
Fiat-centric trading (limited fiat options — primarily crypto-to-crypto)
Institutional custody with regulated reporting (use Coinbase Prime or Gemini)
best_when: A trader needs access to one of the widest altcoin selections (1,700+ pairs) including futures, options, and lending, with a mature API v4 SDK ecosystem.
avoid_when: You're in the US (blocked), need fiat banking integration, or require strict regulatory compliance.

auth.notes:
API Key + API Secret for HMAC-SHA512 signing. KEY header and SIGN header. Timestamp header (Unix seconds). Signature: HMAC-SHA512 of hash_payload. hash_payload: METHOD + '
' + PATH + '
' + query_string + '
' + body_hash + '
' + timestamp. KEY and SIGN in request headers. API key permissions: spot, margin, futures, options, earn, withdrawals. No OAuth2. WebSocket auth via token endpoint.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; spot trading 0.2% maker / 0.2% taker (GT token discounts available)
pricing.paid_tiers: VIP tiers based on 30-day volume with reduced fees
pricing.notes: Cayman Islands incorporated. Founded 2013 by Lin Han. 13M+ users. 1,700+ trading pairs. One of the oldest Asian exchanges. GT Token for fee discounts and governance. Spot, margin (3x-5x), perpetual futures, delivery futures, options, structured products, lending/earn. Gate.io blocked in US, Canada, restricted in some EU countries. Mature API v4 with official SDKs in 7 languages. OpenAPI 3.0 spec available for code generation. Not to be confused with Gateio.ga (scam site). Korean won trading pairs available. High liquidity on major pairs.

performance.rate_limits: 300 requests/second for most endpoints; 100/second for trading; WebSocket 100 subscriptions

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HMAC-SHA512 (more complex than SHA256). OpenAPI 3.0 spec. 7 official SDKs. 300 req/sec. US/Canada blocked. 1,700+ pairs. Cayman Islands company. Complex signature (multi-line payload).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Order creation not idempotent. text field can be set as client order ID for deduplication but behavior not guaranteed. Cancel idempotent by order ID.
known_agent_gotchas: HMAC-SHA512 (not SHA256): signature = HMAC-SHA512(METHOD + newline + PATH + newline + query + newline + body_hash + newline + timestamp)
Gate.io blocked in US and Canada — ensure geolocation compliance before building
Multiple market types: spot, margin, perpetuals, delivery, options — each has separate API endpoints
Body hash: SHA512 of request body (empty string hash for GET requests)
API key permissions are granular: spot, margin, futures, options, earn, withdrawal — use minimal
WebSocket: use separate auth token endpoint, not same API key/secret directly

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA512 (stronger than SHA256) request signing. API key permissions scoped. Cayman Islands jurisdiction (limited regulatory oversight). US/Canada blocked. No OAuth2. Timestamp prevents replay attacks. Cryptocurrency financial data — high value target. OpenAPI spec enables security audit of API surface.
